In a time when Earth was more disgusting than before, with rundown buildings, littered trash everywhere!!!((gray skies asf like Russia or Britain)). The rest of the creatures are fine a little cancer maybe, mostly cats and other wildlife. It's your choice to make a har- i-i mean... An army of cats with wicked mutations to conquer all those whom they oppose! (The second message is more Valentine's themed. And the third message is a cat pov in case anyone has any fursonas to put in. And the third message was suggested by Femgram which you should obviously support like... Right now. I mean it. Go follow that dude... STOP STALLING GO! GOOOOO! AAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHH)
